title: Messages
empty_subtitle: Start a conversation with a community member
disabled_subtitle: Direct messaging is not enabled for this community. To arrange services, please use the exchange request system.
member_search_hint: Start typing to search for members
archived_empty_subtitle: Conversations you archive will appear here
mic_required_subtitle: Please allow microphone access to record voice messages.
voice_send_error: Failed to send voice message. Please try again.
send_error: Failed to send message. Please try again.
edit_error: Failed to edit message. Please try again.
delete_error: Failed to delete message. Please try again.
safeguarding_notice: This conversation may be reviewed by a coordinator for safeguarding purposes.
load_older_hint: Scroll up or tap to load older messages
conversation_start: This is the beginning of your conversation with {{name}}. Say hello!
disabled_inline: Direct messaging is not enabled for this community. Use the exchange request system instead.
archive_confirm_body: The conversation will be hidden from your inbox but can be restored later.
archive_confirm_prompt: Are you sure you want to archive this conversation with {{name}}?
conversation_restored_desc: The conversation has been moved back to your inbox.
messaging_restricted_desc: Your messaging privileges have been restricted by a community administrator. If you believe this is an error, please contact support.
conversation_archived_desc: The conversation has been moved to your archive.
conversation_load_failed: Unable to load this conversation. It may have been deleted or you may not have access.
messaging_restricted_contact: If you believe this is an error, please contact your timebank coordinator.
delete_conversation_self_prompt: This conversation will be removed from your inbox. {{name}} will still have their copy.
delete_conversation_everyone_prompt: This conversation will be permanently removed for both you and {{name}}. This cannot be undone.
conversation_deleted_everyone_desc: The conversation has been removed for both parties.
delete_message_body: How would you like to delete this message?

translate.translation_failed: Tłumaczenie nie powiodło się. Spróbuj ponownie.

auto_translate.tooltip_on: Auto-translate is on — click to turn off
auto_translate.active_banner: Messages in this conversation are being automatically translated into your language.

translate_hint.title: Translation is available
translate_hint.body: You and this person can each write in your own language. Tap "Translate" on any message to read it in yours, or use the translate button in the header to translate everything automatically.

translate_hint.title: Translation is available
translate_hint.body: You and this person can each write in your own language. Tap "Translate" on any message to read it in yours, or use the translate button in the header to translate everything automatically.
auto_translate.tooltip_on: Auto-translate is on — click to turn off
auto_translate.active_banner: Messages in this conversation are being automatically translated into your language.
group_name_placeholder: Enter a name for this group...
group_created_desc: Your group conversation has been created.
group_leave_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave this group? You won't receive new messages.
